creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Nikolai Lifanov from comment #2)
> I'm trying to build it on 12-CURRENT and it doesn't work.
> Can you either fix it or add ONLY_FOR_* to explain what it does build on
> please?
> 
> --- inode.o ---
    ...
> 7 errors generated.
> *** [inode.o] Error code 1

Well that's odd. I know for a fact that it builds on -CURRENT (12).
As that's what my development box is running.
What platform (ARCH) are you attempting to build/test on? I'm
on amd64.

Thanks!

--Chris
